message: bd sync: update bd-3s8 with description and move to open

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-35o","title":"Add --yes flag to bd doctor --fix","description":"bd doctor --fix prompts for confirmation, which blocks automation (CI/CD, scripts, hooks).

Requirements:
1. Add --yes or -y flag to bd doctor command
2. When --yes is passed, skip confirmation prompts
3. Still log what's being fixed (don't go completely silent)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-11-30T21:14:08.696905-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-30T21:14:49.867041-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-30T21:14:49.867041-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-39o","title":"Rename last_import_hash metadata key to jsonl_content_hash","description":"The metadata key 'last_import_hash' is misleading because it's updated on both import AND export (sync.go:614, import.go:320).

Better names:
- jsonl_content_hash (more accurate)
- last_sync_hash (clearer intent)

This is a breaking change requiring migration of existing metadata values.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-20T21:31:07.568739-05:00","updated_at":"2025-11-29T22:06:06.329653-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-28T23:13:46.885978-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-3gc","title":"Audit remaining cmd/bd files for error handling consistency","description":"Extend ERROR_HANDLING_AUDIT.md to cover: daemon_sync.go, update.go, list.go, show.go, close.go, reopen.go, dep.go, label.go, comments.go, delete.go, compact.go, config.go, validate.go and other high-usage command files","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-24T00:28:55.890991-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-29T22:06:06.32994-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-28T23:37:52.251887-08:00"}
-{"id":"bd-3s8","title":"Imperator clone on beads-sync branch causes bd sync failures","description":"","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-30T22:53:51.056763-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-01T21:05:20.328222-08:00"}
+{"id":"bd-3s8","title":"Imperator clone on beads-sync branch causes bd sync failures","description":"When the imperator's git clone is checked out on the beads-sync branch (instead of main), bd sync fails because:
1. It tries to create a worktree for beads-sync but that branch is already checked out
2. The worktree operations fail with 'already checked out' errors

Potential solutions:
- [Config] Ensure imperator clones are on main branch, not beads-sync
- [Code] Add detection in beads for this case and provide a helpful error message
- [Code] Auto-recover by resetting the worktree state

This is primarily a gastown deployment/configuration issue. The beads code could be improved to detect and handle this case more gracefully.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-30T22:53:51.056763-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-01T21:11:48.448444-08:00","comments":[{"id":1,"issue_id":"bd-3s8","author":"stevey","text":"This is primarily a gastown deployment issue - the imperator clone should be on main branch, not beads-sync. However, beads could be improved to detect and handle this case more gracefully. Moving to open status for triage.","created_at":"2025-12-02T05:11:43Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-44e","title":"Ensure deletions.jsonl is tracked in git","description":"Parent: bd-imj

Ensure deletions.jsonl is tracked in git (not ignored).

Update bd init and gitignore upgrade logic to:
1. NOT add deletions.jsonl to .gitignore
2. Ensure it is committed alongside beads.jsonl

The file must be in git for cross-clone propagation to work.

Acceptance criteria:
- bd init does not ignore deletions.jsonl
- Existing .gitignore files are not broken
- File appears in git status when modified","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-25T09:57:21.663196-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-25T14:55:43.225883-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-25T14:55:43.225883-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-4aao","title":"Fix failing integration tests in beads-mcp","description":"The `beads-mcp` test suite has failures in `tests/test_bd_client_integration.py` (assertion error in `test_init_creates_beads_directory`) and errors in `tests/test_worktree_separate_dbs.py` (setup failures finding database). These need to be investigated and fixed to ensure a reliable CI baseline.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-20T18:53:28.4803-05:00","updated_at":"2025-11-25T21:39:20.967106-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-25T21:39:20.967106-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-4ew","title":"bd doctor should detect fresh clone and recommend 'bd init'","description":"When running `bd doctor` on a fresh clone (JSONL exists, no .db file), it should:

1. Detect this is a fresh clone situation
2. Recommend `bd init --prefix <detected-prefix>` as the fix
3. Show the prefix detected from the JSONL file

Currently it shows various warnings (git hooks, merge driver, etc.) but doesn't address the fundamental issue: the database needs to be hydrated.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-11-27T20:21:15.691764-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-28T22:14:49.092112-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-28T22:14:49.092112-08:00"}
